title: Kananites #2581
definition:
Canaanite = "zealous"

 1) the surname of apostle Simon, otherwise known as "Simon Zelotes"
nasbUsage:
Definition: Canaanite = "zealous"

 1) the surname of apostle Simon, otherwise known as "Simon Zelotes"

    NASB:  Cananaean, Ara. for Zealot, surname of one of the twelve apostles:
